evidence: Maine DOE exposes the SAU-by-municipality workbook plus live NEO town and SAU selector pages, and the raw ContactSearchBySAU HTML preserves a real CSRF-backed public form. But bounded POST replays with concrete public organizations such as Portland Public Schools (OrgId 364), York Public Schools (OrgId 542), and RSU 60/MSAD 60 (OrgId 913) still return HTTP 500 before yielding verified local contact rows or an export file.
Maine DHHS district office pages are real and local, but they still do not expose county coverage or a public town/county lookup contract.
